commit.message:
Add root tsconfig.json, test script, repository field

Fixes quality scanner warnings for monorepo structure detection.

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

docs(CLAUDE): adopt slim per-repo shape

Refactors this CLAUDE.md to the slim convention documented in
SKILLS.md. Platform-wide knowledge (tech stack, brand, deploy,
mobile rules, paths) lives in SKILLS.md as the single source of
truth -- duplicating it per repo just creates drift surface area
that breaks AI agents over time. This file now only carries
what is unique to this repo.

Fix: vendor SDK into repo so CF Pages builds succeed

SDK was a workspace link to a directory outside the repo — CF Pages
can't resolve it during build. Moved SDK source into web/src/sdk/
with direct relative imports. Two prior deploys were failing for this.

Convert into an installable PWA (platform mandate)

Was failing the new PWA offline correctness check: index.html linked
/manifest.json but vite.config.ts had no VitePWA, so no service worker
was ever registered. Installing the app would deposit an icon, then
tapping it would fail offline.

Fix mirrors the canonical pattern in the freeappstore template + the
FGS games:
  - Add vite-plugin-pwa to devDependencies, refresh lockfile.
  - Replace vite.config.ts with a full VitePWA setup — proper
    workbox config (raised cap, fonts runtime caching, wasm/json in
    globPatterns), and manifest defined inline so the plugin
    generates manifest.webmanifest at build.
  - Drop the static <link rel="manifest"> from index.html (plugin
    injects its own).
  - Delete web/public/manifest.json (plugin generates).
  - Copy icon-192.png and icon-512.png from the canonical FAS set
    (freeappstore marketing repo).

Preserves the app's existing theme_color, background_color, and
orientation from the prior manifest.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Convert into an installable PWA (platform mandate)

Was failing the new PWA offline correctness check: index.html linked
/manifest.json but vite.config.ts had no VitePWA, so no service worker
was ever registered. Installing the app would deposit an icon, then
tapping it would fail offline.

Fix mirrors the canonical pattern in the freeappstore template + the
FGS games:
  - Add vite-plugin-pwa to devDependencies, refresh lockfile.
  - Replace vite.config.ts with a full VitePWA setup — proper
    workbox config (raised cap, fonts runtime caching, wasm/json in
    globPatterns), and manifest defined inline so the plugin
    generates manifest.webmanifest at build.
  - Drop the static <link rel="manifest"> from index.html (plugin
    injects its own).
  - Delete web/public/manifest.json (plugin generates).
  - Copy icon-192.png and icon-512.png from the canonical FAS set
    (freeappstore marketing repo).

Preserves the app's existing theme_color, background_color, and
orientation from the prior manifest.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand to full ISO 3166-1 country list via REST Countries API

- countries.ts: replace hand-curated ~190 countries with exhaustive 250-entry
  list generated from restcountries.com, adding Malaysia, Singapore, Seychelles,
  Ivory Coast, territories and island states previously missing
- WorldMap ADM0_TO_NUMERIC: replace with full API-generated 249-entry mapping
  covering every alpha-3 code; add XKX for Kosovo (no ccn3 in ISO standard)
- useSnowData SAMPLE_POINTS: add 19 snow-capable countries that were missing
  (Andorra, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Belarus, Bosnia, Estonia, Kosovo, Latvia,
  Lebanon, Lesotho, Liechtenstein, Luxembourg, Moldova, Montenegro, Serbia,
  Slovakia, Slovenia, Turkmenistan, North Macedonia) — 93 total, under 100 cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use translate3d + transformOrigin 0 0 for GPU-accelerated map pan

Switches applyTransform from SVG setAttribute to CSS translate3d so the
browser composites the map on the GPU. Pinning transformOrigin to 0 0
prevents the bounding-box drift that broke the earlier CSS approach.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix infinite pan teleport and FPS bugs in WorldMap

- Replace CSS matrix transform with SVG setAttribute: CSS transforms on SVG
  elements scale from the bounding-box center (not SVG origin), causing
  massive drift when 3 world copies are rendered, exposing blank edges and
  jarring teleport jumps on modulo wrap
- Center the x modulo wrap at [-ww/2, +ww/2) so the seam fires while safely
  inside the drawn copies, never at a visible edge
- Stop spamming setTransform on every pan frame at min zoom: only trigger
  React re-render when crossing a zoom limit boundary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Update README.md
Update README.md

fix: remove platform-owned CSS tokens from my-app to pass FreeAppStore compliance

Surgically removed all 12 FAS-reserved variables (--paper, --ink, --muted,
--line, --line-strong, --panel, --glass, --dock, --accent, --success,
--warning, --error) from both :root and :root[data-theme='dark'] blocks in
my-app/web/src/index.css. Only app-specific tokens retained.

Also adds my-app/ scaffold and workspace pnpm-lock.yaml to version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial: Streak — daily habits with live buddy grids

Showcase app for FreeAppStore demonstrating all 4 SDK primitives
load-bearingly: auth + kv + db + rooms-as-presence.

- auth: GitHub OAuth identity (user.login as handle)
- kv: private config (habits, buddies, tz, cached doc ids)
- db: public 'grids' (one doc/user) + 'profiles' (login lookup) collections
- rooms: ephemeral 'streak-pulse-${login}' channels for live buddy updates

Architecture notes:
- recordCheck does read-modify-write to avoid shallow-merge races on db.update
- gridDocId cached in kv.config after first lookup with explicit
  orderBy:'created_at',order:'asc' to match backend default
- Own squares animate from local state; buddies' from incoming room pulses
  (DO broadcast excludes sender)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
